# Google Calendar · Productivity

Generated: Jul 20, 2026, 10:26 PM

## **Contents** {#toc}

- [Bugs and stability](#theme-bugs_stability)
- [Feature requests](#theme-feature_requests)
- [Sync and accounts](#theme-sync_accounts)
- [Notifications and reminders](#theme-notifications_reminders)


## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      9 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jul 8, 2026 - Jul 18, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Cid Gomez_, Jul 18, 2026, 1/5: "Keeps crashing, cannot launch it through any way - icon press, play store, etc. Redmagic 11 Pro+"
            2. _Federico Massari_, Jul 9, 2026, 2/5: "Various bugs such as the app not responding and exiting automatically, inability to change, add or delete events, inability to change event color (default color only), clearing the Cache doesn't solve the problem, reinstalling doesn't even work. From redmagic 11 pro"
            3. _A. T._, Jul 9, 2026, 2/5: "For two days now I have only been able to choose the default color when I want to put an appointment in my calendar, while I often use multiple colors for a good overview. All new appointments now have the same color. How can I fix this? Or is there a bug in the new update? Had another update on July 9 and the problem is still not solved..."

## **Feature requests** {#theme-feature_requests}

   **Feature requests.**
      6 recent review(s) mention feature requests.
      Review window: Jul 18, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are asking for missing capabilities. This can reveal roadmap opportunities.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Johnny Mears_, Jul 19, 2026, 1/5: "I can't add a public calendar from the app??? I have to use a web browser??? That seems like such a basic feature. How is this not available in the app??? The calendar app has been around for years! Did Google layoff all the calendar app devs to invest in AI? I bet Gemini could add that feature in an afternoon! This is why Google sucks! They rather shove AI in your face than focus on features people actually use."
            2. _Daniel Oliveira_, Jul 19, 2026, 5/5: "Needs more colors for main scheduling notes, not just the subnotes. Lastly, it needs an easy go to certain date feature. I don't know why this hasn't been though of? It's so elementary. It's difficult to go to a far future or past date."
            3. _Syed Ali Mehdi Zaidi_, Jul 18, 2026, 5/5: "​"Great app, but really needs two essential updates for Hijri Calendar users: 1. Option for manual Hijri date adjustment (+/- 1 or 2 days) for regional moon sightings. 2. A clean lock screen widget showing both Gregorian and Hijri dates. These additions would be extremely helpful for millions of users worldwide.""

## **Sync and accounts** {#theme-sync_accounts}

   **Sync and accounts.**
      3 recent review(s) mention sync and accounts.
      Review window: Jul 18, 2026 - Jul 18, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention sync, backup, login, or accounts. This points to trust and cross-device workflow expectations.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Pink Babe_, Jul 18, 2026, 1/5: "STILL NEEDS IMPROVEMENT. STILL cant change widget color or transparency like samsung calendar. Didn't sync all events from samsung calendar. And the colors are dull and ugly. Should be brighter. I also dont want to see the next months days when looking at the current month. why would u show 5 or 6 weeks at a time? nobody does that. and its confusing. it also stretches it out too much and looks silly. still be using samsung calendar til they improve this one, 3 years and still no change."

## **Notifications and reminders** {#theme-notifications_reminders}

   **Notifications and reminders.**
      3 recent review(s) mention notifications and reminders.
      Review window: Jul 18, 2026 - Jul 18, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention reminders or notifications. In productivity niches, this often points to retention mechanics.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _FERNANDAS GEORGE_, Jul 18, 2026, 4/5: "Need Reminder Alaram"
